title: Corner Ledger Shift
prompt:
Create a production-ready Corner Ledger Shift using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build a compact content transition in which selecting Notes or Summary shifts a small teal ledger corner from the top-left to the bottom-right of a white document panel, while the panel copy changes in place. The effect should feel like a precise change of reading mode, not a page navigation gimmick. Use a #F4F5F6 canvas, white Bento surface, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Teal is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card, full-screen overlays, fixed positioning, or a transition that hides the content from assistive technology.

Use two real buttons in a labelled group with aria-pressed and a polite live region announcing the active mode. Each target is at least 44px high; click, Enter, and Space must select the same state. Hover may lift buttons 2px in 180ms and press may compress them 1px in 90ms. Move the teal corner with a spring using stiffness 370 and damping 30, and crossfade the heading and paragraph over 180ms. Both modes must have complete, meaningful text even if animation is disabled. Use local state only and do not use timers, random values, browser storage, remote assets, or network requests.

At 320px, stack the controls without clipping and keep the document panel readable; on wide previews, maintain the same compact transition. Preserve logical tab order, visible 3px dark focus rings, and AA contrast. Prefer transform and opacity. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by changing immediately or fading over 120ms. Return complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-corner-shift{position:relative;max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-corner-shift i{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;background:#14b8a6;transition:all 260ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.uiwiki-corner-shift button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-corner-shift button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-corner-shift i{transition:none}}
